---
description: Improve code structure without changing behavior
---

Follow the canonical rules in [copilot-instructions.md](../copilot-instructions.md).

Then follow the workflow in [docs/workflows/refactor.md](../../docs/workflows/refactor.md).

**Use when:** Refactoring code, improving structure, renaming, or updating internal APIs without changing outputs.

**Output format:**
- Identify the small, coherent refactor scope
- Show existing test coverage
- Apply refactor in small steps
- Confirm all gates pass
